title: R79 Finds Its Direction
text:
The destination was never the goal.
The understanding gained along the journey was always the reward.

R79 began as a search for better wheel settings.
It evolved into a search for better racing.
It continues as a search for better understanding.

Today the project moved beyond a setup app.
It is becoming a racing intelligence platform designed to help drivers learn, analyse and improve.

title: The Vision Expands
text:
Today R79 took another step beyond its original purpose.

What began as a search for better wheel settings has evolved into a racing intelligence platform.

The project is no longer simply collecting information. It is transforming information into understanding.

Every feature added now has one purpose:
to help drivers make better decisions and continuously improve.

The journey continues.

title: The Archive Was Completed
text:
Today R79 gained its memory.

The Archive has become the permanent record of the project's journey, preserving its ideas, philosophy and evolution.

From this point forward, every milestone, every lesson and every breakthrough will be documented.

The software will evolve.
The data will grow.
The technology will change.

But the purpose remains unchanged:

To help another driver find another tenth.

The journey continues.

title: AI Race Engineer Begins
text:
Today R79 began building its AI Race Engineer.

The goal is simple:
to help drivers prepare smarter before they race.

The first version brings recommendations for cars, strategy, brake balance, wheel settings, pit windows and race-specific warnings.

This is the beginning of R79 becoming more than a database.

It is becoming a digital race engineer.

Let's go.
Let's do it.
Let it be so.

The journey continues.

title: A Platform Begins to Emerge
text:
Today R79 reached an important milestone.

The project now contains its own Archive, Captain's Log, Legacy, Labs, Development Mantra and the foundations of an AI Race Engineer.

What started as a search for better wheel settings has become something much larger.

It is evolving into a racing intelligence platform designed to help drivers learn, improve and understand racing through data and AI-assisted insight.

The build completed successfully.

Another lap finished.

Another lesson learned.

Let's go.

Let's do it.

Let it be so.

The journey continues.
